name: Unit4 ERPx REST API
description: Comprehensive REST API for Unit4 ERPx cloud ERP platform covering time and expenses, personnel, payroll, procurement, project management, customers and sales, inventory management, planning, commitment accounting, accounting, and reporting. Supports OAuth 2.0 and machine-to-machine (M2M) authentication via client credentials flow.

potentialAction.name: Time and Expenses Management
potentialAction.description: Manage employee time entries, expense claims, and related approvals.

potentialAction.name: Personnel Management
potentialAction.description: Manage employee records, HR data, and organizational structures.

potentialAction.name: Payroll Processing
potentialAction.description: Process payroll runs, manage pay elements, and handle payroll reporting.

potentialAction.name: Procurement
potentialAction.description: Manage purchase orders, suppliers, requisitions, and procurement workflows.

potentialAction.name: Project Management
potentialAction.description: Create and manage projects, tasks, budgets, and project reporting.

potentialAction.name: Customers and Sales
potentialAction.description: Manage customer records, sales orders, and customer-related transactions.

potentialAction.name: Inventory Management
potentialAction.description: Track and manage inventory items, warehouses, and stock movements.

potentialAction.name: Planning
potentialAction.description: Business planning and budgeting through the ERPx planner module.

potentialAction.name: Commitment Accounting
potentialAction.description: Manage committed expenditure, encumbrances, and commitment accounting entries.

potentialAction.name: Accounting
potentialAction.description: General ledger, accounts payable, accounts receivable, and financial reporting.

potentialAction.name: Reporting
potentialAction.description: Generate financial, operational, and analytical reports from ERPx data.
